place: Taling Ngam, Ko Samui, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Five-Bedroom Beachfront Villa, Taling Ngam, Koh Samui
blurb: A five-bedroom beachfront villa on the quiet south-west coast of Koh Samui at Taling Ngam, framing sunset views across the water to the Five Islands. Direct sand-to-sea access, a beachfront infinity pool and jacuzzi, an in-house gym, library and sala, and a full team led by a private Thai chef. Sleeps up to ten adults and four children.
detail:
Set right on the sand at Taling Ngam, on the tranquil south-western shore of Koh Samui, this five-bedroom villa opens straight onto its own stretch of beach with an uninterrupted outlook to the Five Islands and some of the island's finest sunsets.

The heart of the home is a beachfront infinity pool that mirrors the palms and the evening sky, edged by sun loungers and a bubbling jacuzzi, with manicured lawns running down to the water. Indoor and outdoor living and dining areas, a library and a fully-equipped kitchen make it as easy to host a long lunch as a quiet evening in.

Five en-suite bedrooms sleep up to ten adults, with a large master suite and two rooms that connect to adjoining children's rooms fitted with bunk beds — space for four children, and up to four further guests by arrangement. A dedicated kids' room, an in-house gym, a sala for shade and a Thai massage space round out the villa.

A full team looks after every stay: a villa manager coordinating the household, daily housekeeping and laundry, butlers on hand through mealtimes, and a skilled Thai chef preparing Thai cuisine and Western favourites to order. Taling Ngam keeps you close to the island's west-coast beaches, the marina and golf, with Nathon town and the main pier a short drive away.
